memory.summary: Friends invited me to Echo, but I'm only 60% done with my midterm review and have significant sleep debt.
Midterm progress improved, but the club invitation was missed. Mina is leaving now; I must decide whether to join her despite my sleep debt.
Midterm progress is now 92%, but my high stress and sleep debt make joining Mina's Echo group unlikely right now.
After 8 hours of sleep, my energy is fully restored to 10.0 with zero debt. I can now confidently decide whether to join Mina's Echo group without stress hindering my choice.
The midterm is complete, and with full energy restored after sleep, I am ready to join Mina's Echo group without stress.
